whisky drinking states. Along with
this came a sharp advance in the
price of corn. Following the pass
age of the anti-express liquor
traffic bill comes the uncertainty
of what the pure food law may do.


Still further down the road the
prohibitionists have erected a
sign reading: National prohibition
bib So the liquor men have
some cause to be detected. They
are letting out cry of personal
liberty" that can be heard all over
the District of Columbia.


And the blue ribboners are con.
tinuing to do business. They have
mapped out a plan for the sixty.
first congress that is anything but
encouraging to the saloon interests
The campaign includes the intro.
ducing of a bill providing. that an
amendment to tho constitution pro.
hibiting the manufacture or sale OF
liquor in the United States, be pro-
posed to the legislatures of the 46
states.


Should three-fourths of the state
legislatures ratify the proposed
amendment, the United States
would become nationally dry.


If congress refuses to pass this
bill, the national prohibition com
mittee will try to have three
fourths of the state legislatures
petition congress to adopt the
amendment. Then congress would
be forced to do so.
